description_long: This is a block of blue cheese with a roughly rectangular shape and uneven, natural edges. The cheese is predominantly off-white to pale yellow, marbled with blue-green veins of mold that are concentrated in some areas and more sparse in others. The surface displays a slightly rough, ridged texture, likely from the cheese-making process, and there are no visible holes or eyes. The cheese appears dense and crumbly, with some areas showing deeper pockets of blue mold. There is no visible rind, and the cheese is unwrapped, exposing its natural surface. The object is placed against a plain, neutral background with no visible packaging or supporting surface.
description: A block of blue cheese with a pale, marbled body and blue-green veins, featuring a rough, ridged surface and no visible rind or packaging.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, rectangular face with subtle horizontal ridges and a few small blue-green mold spots.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the uneven, natural edge and more pronounced marbling of blue mold throughout the cheese.
description_view_2: The top or end view reveals a dense concentration of blue mold in a large pocket, surrounded by the pale cheese body.
description_view_3: This side view displays a slanted surface with scattered blue-green veins and a generally smooth, pale appearance.
